other_observers: Bryan Patrick and David Hartley; Barbara Schaefer
specific_location: 1203 Vega Dr. at Barbara Schaefer's house in the Lower Skyway area of Colo Spgs.
description: Medium sized woodpecker. Black back with distincive face. Yellow eye with dark pupil oon dark auricular. Dark area above and below bill set off by white behind the black areas posterior to the bill that bleeds down the face to the throat. Red on crown but not as far forward as the eye. Breast dark and a white belly with some dark thin veritcle streaks. Bill Black.Behaviors: Snuck in to tree above feeder and probed bark. Also observed at a verticle hanging seed feeder that had millet and sunflower seeds in it. Most of the time was spent on dead areas of live and dead trees foraging under the bark and on occassion pecking.Call: gave an occasional "wacka" callPlumage: basic
